executable.title: GaussianLPF_sramtilak
executable.description: Applies a 3D recursive Gaussian low-pass filter (itk::RecursiveGaussianImageFilter) to reduce noise in a 3D image. The same sigma value is applied independently along the X, Y, and Z axes. Larger sigma values produce stronger smoothing at the cost of spatial resolution
executable.acknowledgements: ITK RecursiveGaussianImageFilter. ITK Software Guide Book 2, Chapter 2.

parameters.label: Input/Output
parameters.description: Input and output volume file paths

image.label: Input Volume
image.description: 3D input image to be smoothed with Gaussian low-pass filter.

parameters.label: Filter Parameters
parameters.description: Gaussian kernel width controlling the degree of smoothing

double.label: Sigma (mm)
double.description: Standard deviation of the isotropic Gaussian kernel applied in X, Y, and Z. Small values (0.5-1.5 mm) remove fine noise while preserving edges. Large values (3.0+ mm) aggressively smooth but blur structural boundaries.
